mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket (order_id, seat_id, user_id, qr_code, ticket_no, status, verify_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{seatId}, #{userId}, #{qrCode}, #{ticketNo}, #{status}, #{verifyTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

INSERT INTO ticket (order_id, seat_id, user_id, qr_code, ticket_no, status, verify_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{ticket.orderId}, #{ticket.seatId}, #{ticket.userId}, #{ticket.qrCode}, #{ticket.ticketNo}, #{ticket.status}, #{ticket.verifyTime}, #{ticket.createTime}, #{ticket.updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, seat_id, user_id, qr_code, ticket_no, status, verify_time, create_time, update_time FROM ticket WHERE qr_code = #{qrCode}
SELECT id, order_id, seat_id, user_id, qr_code, ticket_no, status, verify_time, create_time, update_time FROM ticket WHERE ticket_no = #{ticketNo}
SELECT id, order_id, seat_id, user_id, qr_code, ticket_no, status, verify_time, create_time, update_time FROM ticket WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, order_id, seat_id, user_id, qr_code, ticket_no, status, verify_time, create_time, update_time FROM ticket WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
